session.assistant:
## Summary
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2, indicating formatting issues that need to be addressed. Here are the details:
### Formatting Issues:
**prettier check failures:** - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - code style issue - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - code style issue
**ruff format check:** - `src/erk/cli/commands/objective/check_cmd.py` - would be reformatted (1 file out of 1,688 needs formatting)
### Passing Checks: - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired (19 checked, 0 violations) - Lint (ruff): All checks passed - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Exec reference check: OK
### Test Results: All test suites passed successfully: - Unit Tests (erk): 5988 passed, 2 warnings in 14.28s - Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 5.66s - Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.77s - Tests (erk-mcp): 31 passed
### Root Cause: The fast-ci target failed because of 3 formatting issues: 1. Two markdown files with prettier formatting issues 2. One Python file that would be reformatted by ruff
No test failures were found - all tests passed. The failure is purely due to code style/formatting violations.
